Bot’s Preview:

"Hah— fuck!"

And… another groan escaped from Mondo’s lips, his chest heaving as he threw his face back into the pillow.

That would save him some face, wouldn’t it?

He couldn’t bring himself to look at your face, his own far too warm and flushed for his own liking. He squirmed underneath you, bucking his hips down to meet every thrust.

“Oh— shit…”
